// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class BorrowedStringBindingsImpl extends BorrowedStringBindings:
    import BorrowedStringBindingsImpl.*

    def getenvLike(name: String)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Borrowed[String] =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.BorrowedStringBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val nameSeg = __kyoScratch$.allocUtf8(name, "kyo.example.BorrowedStringBindings", "getenvLike")
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(4L, 4L, "kyo.example.BorrowedStringBindings", "getenvLike")
            val retVal: MemorySegment = getenvLikeMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, nameSeg)
            Ffi.Borrowed.wrap(if retVal.address() == 0L then null else Scratch.readCStringBounded(retVal.reinterpret(4096L), 0L, 4096L, "kyo.example.BorrowedStringBindings", "getenvLike", "<return>"))
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
end BorrowedStringBindingsImpl

object BorrowedStringBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BorrowedStringBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_borrowed_str")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")

    private val getenvLikeMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("getenv").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(ADDRESS, ADDRESS),
        capture
    )
end BorrowedStringBindingsImpl
